32	
33	  const filtered = useMemo(() => {

35	    if (!q) return resumes;
36	    return resumes.filter(
37	      (r) =>
38	        r.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
39	        (r.companyName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ?? false) ||
40	        (r.description?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ?? false),
41	    );
42	  }, [resumes, search]);
43	
44	  const comparators = useMemo(

48	        (a.companyName ?? '').localeCompare(b.companyName ?? ''),
49	      updated: (a: (typeof resumes)[0], b: (typeof resumes)[0]) =>
50	        new Date(a.updatedAt).getTime() - new Date(b.updatedAt).getTime(),
51	    }),
52	    [],
53	  );
54	
55	  const { sorted, sortKey, direction, toggleSort } = useUrlSort(filtered, comparators, 'updated');

1	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
2	
3	const RESULT_KEY = 'resume-pilot-workspace-result';
4	const DEBOUNCE_MS = 400;
5	const MANUAL_KEY = '__manual__';
6	
7	export type RecommendedItem = { id: string; title: string; score: number };
8	export type InterviewItem = { category: string; question: string };
9	
10	export type WorkspaceResultState = {
11	  result: Record<string, unknown> | null;
12	  recommended: RecommendedItem[];
13	  interview: InterviewItem[];
14	  keywords: Record<string, unknown> | null;
15	};
16	
17	const EMPTY: WorkspaceResultState = {
18	  result: null,
19	  recommended: [],
20	  interview: [],
21	  keywords: null,
22	};
23	
24	type ResultsByPosting = Record<string, WorkspaceResultState>;
25	
26	function loadAllResults(): ResultsByPosting {
27	  try {
28	    const raw = localStorage.getItem(RESULT_KEY);
29	    if (!raw) return {};
30	    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ResultsByPosting;
31	    return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : {};
32	  } catch {
33	    return {};
34	  }
35	}
36	
37	export type DraftSaveStatus = 'idle' | 'saving' | 'saved';
38	
39	/**
40	 * 결과(자기소개서·문장 정밀진단·경험 추천 등)는 선택된 기업공고(postingId)별로 분리 저장한다.
41	 * 공고를 바꾸면 해당 공고에 저장된 결과가 표시되고, 새 공고를 고르면 빈 화면이 뜬다.
42	 */
43	export function useWorkspaceResult(postingId: string) {
44	  const postingKey = postingId || MANUAL_KEY;
45	  const initial = useRef(loadAllResults());
46	  const [byPosting, setByPosting] = useState<ResultsByPosting>(initial.current);
47	  const [saveStatus, setSaveStatus] = useState<DraftSaveStatus>('idle');
48	  const timer = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
49	
50	  const persist = useCallback((next: ResultsByPosting) => {
51	    if (timer.current) clearTimeout(timer.current);
52	    setSaveStatus('saving');
53	    timer.current = setTimeout(() => {
54	      try {
55	        const cleaned = Object.fromEntries(
56	          Object.entries(next).filter(([, v]) => v.result || v.recommended.length > 0),
57	        );
58	        if (Object.keys(cleaned).length === 0) {
59	          localStorage.removeItem(RESULT_KEY);
60	        } else {
61	          localStorage.setItem(RESULT_KEY, JSON.stringify(cleaned));
62	        }
63	        setSaveStatus('saved');
64	      } catch {
65	        setSaveStatus('idle');
66	      }
67	    }, DEBOUNCE_MS);
68	  }, []);
69	
70	  const setBundle = useCallback(
71	    (patch: Partial<WorkspaceResultState> | ((prev: WorkspaceResultState) => WorkspaceResultState)) => {
72	      setByPosting((prev) => {
73	        const prevState = prev[postingKey] ?? EMPTY;
74	        const nextState = typeof patch === 'function' ? patch(prevState) : { ...prevState, ...patch };
75	        const next = { ...prev, [postingKey]: nextState };
76	        persist(next);
77	        return next;
78	      });
79	    },
80	    [persist, postingKey],
81	  );
82	
83	  // 현재 공고의 결과를 완전히 삭제한다 (초기화 버튼 전용).
84	  const clearResult = useCallback(() => {
85	    setByPosting((prev) => {
86	      if (!(postingKey in prev)) return prev;
87	      const next = { ...prev };
88	      delete next[postingKey];
89	      persist(next);
90	      return next;
91	    });
92	  }, [persist, postingKey]);
93	
94	  // 문항 제목·경험 선택 등 생성 조건이 바뀌어 기존 결과가 더 이상 유효하지 않을 때
95	  // 화면에서만 지운다 (다른 공고의 저장 데이터는 건드리지 않음).
96	  const clearVisibleResult = useCallback(() => {
97	    setBundle({ result: null, interview: [], keywords: null });
98	  }, [setBundle]);
99	
100	  const state = byPosting[postingKey] ?? EMPTY;
101	  const wasResultRestored = initial.current[postingKey]?.result != null;
102	
103	  useEffect(
104	    () => () => {
105	      if (timer.current) clearTimeout(timer.current);
106	    },
107	    [],
108	  );
109	
110	  return { ...state, setBundle, clearResult, clearVisibleResult, saveStatus, wasResultRestored };
111	}
112
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-15 14:39:54Z)**_

Root cause confirmed: `createResume` (backend save → shows in dashboard) exists in the API, but WorkspacePage never calls it. Generated results only get saved to `localStorage` (per-posting), so they never reach `/api/v1/resumes` and thus never appear on the dashboard. I'll add a "내 자기소개서에 저장" button to persist the generated result to the backend.

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-15 14:42:06Z)**_

Build succeeds. Summary of the fix:

**Root cause**: The recent "기업공고별로 분리 저장" feature only saves generated cover letters to browser `localStorage` (per job-posting key), never to the backend `/api/v1/resumes` API. The Dashboard queries the backend, so anything generated in Workspace never showed up there — and it isn't lost, it's still in your browser's localStorage, but invisible in the dashboard list.

**Fix**: Added a "내 자기소개서에 저장" button in the Workspace result panel ([WorkspacePage.tsx](resume-web/src/pages/WorkspacePage.tsx)) that calls `api.createResume` with the generated content and the selected job posting's title/company, then invalidates the dashboard's `resumes` query. Added matching i18n strings in all 4 locales.

Note: your **already-generated** result from earlier today is still only in localStorage — go back to `/workspace` (with the same job posting selected) and click the new save button to push it into the dashboard.

---

```tsx
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { Popover as PopoverPrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

function Popover({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Root>) {
  return <PopoverPrimitive.Root data-slot="popover" {...props} />
}

function PopoverTrigger({ ...props }: React.ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Trigger>) {
  return <PopoverPrimitive.Trigger data-slot="popover-trigger" {...props} />
}

function PopoverContent({
  className,
  align = "center",
  sideOffset = 4,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Content>) {
  return (
    <PopoverPrimitive.Portal>
      <PopoverPrimitive.Content
        data-slot="popover-content"
        align={align}
        sideOffset={sideOffset}
        className={cn(
          "z-50 w-72 origin-(--radix-popover-content-transform-origin) rounded-md border bg-popover p-4 text-sm text-popover-foreground shadow-md outline-hidden data-open:animate-in data-open:fade-in-0 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95",
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      />
    </PopoverPrimitive.Portal>
  )
}

export { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent }

```

- 나머지 엔드포인트: `GET /{id}`, `POST`, `PATCH /{id}`, `DELETE /{id}`, `POST/GET /{id}/versions`, `GET /{id}/versions/compare` — 모두 jobPosting과 무관.

**4. 커밋 확인 — 사용자가 준 해시 정정 필요**
`31dc6cd`는 "워크스페이스 2분할 레이아웃 및 결과 타이핑 애니메이션 적용" 커밋(2026-07-14)이고, 해당 백엔드는 건드리지 않음(프론트 전용 파일만 변경).

package com.resumepilot.domain.resume;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.*;
import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
import org.hibernate.annotations.UpdateTimestamp;

import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.UUID;

@Entity
@Table(name = "resumes")
@Getter
@Setter
@NoArgsConstructor
@AllArgsConstructor
@Builder
public class Resume {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "user_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID userId;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String title;

    @Column(name = "company_name")
    private String companyName;

    private String description;

    @CreationTimestamp
    @Column(name = "created_at", updatable = false)
    private Instant createdAt;

    @UpdateTimestamp
    @Column(name = "updated_at")
    private Instant updatedAt;
}
```

package com.resumepilot.domain.resume;

import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

public interface ResumeRepository extends JpaRepository<Resume, UUID> {
    List<Resume> findByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(UUID userId);
}
```

(참고: 같은 패키지에 `ResumeVersion.java`, `ResumeVersionRepository.java`도 존재하지만 요청 범위(Resume 본체)는 위 파일들입니다.)

### 3. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/application/resume/ResumeService.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.application.resume;

import com.resumepilot.application.rag.RagService;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.Resume;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeRepository;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeVersion;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeVersionRepository;
import com.resumepilot.global.exception.BusinessException;
import com.resumepilot.global.exception.ErrorCode;
import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.resume.*;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class ResumeService {

    private final ResumeRepository resumeRepository;
    private final ResumeVersionRepository resumeVersionRepository;
    private final RagService ragService;

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public List<ResumeResponse> list(UUID userId) {
        return resumeRepository.findByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId).stream()
                .map(this::toResponse)
                .toList();
    }

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public ResumeResponse get(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        return toResponse(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public ResumeResponse create(UUID userId, ResumeCreateRequest request) {
        Resume resume = Resume.builder()
                .userId(userId)
                .title(request.title())
                .companyName(request.companyName())
                .description(request.description())
                .build();
        resumeRepository.save(resume);

        if (request.content() != null && !request.content().isBlank()) {
            ResumeVersion v = createVersion(resume.getId(), request.content(), null);
            ragService.embedResume(userId, v.getId(), v.getContent());
        }
        return toResponse(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public ResumeResponse update(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, ResumeUpdateRequest request) {
        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        if (request.title() != null) resume.setTitle(request.title());
        if (request.companyName() != null) resume.setCompanyName(request.companyName());
        if (request.description() != null) resume.setDescription(request.description());
        return toResponse(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public void delete(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        resumeRepository.delete(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public ResumeVersionResponse createVersion(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, ResumeVersionCreateRequest request) {
        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        ResumeVersion v = createVersion(resumeId, request.content(), null);
        ragService.embedResume(userId, v.getId(), v.getContent());
        return toVersionResponse(v);
    }

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public List<ResumeVersionResponse> listVersions(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        return resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resumeId).stream()
                .map(this::toVersionResponse)
                .toList();
    }

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public ResumeVersionCompareResponse compareVersions(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, int versionA, int versionB) {
        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        ResumeVersion va = resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdAndVersionNumber(resumeId, versionA)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Version A not found"));
        ResumeVersion vb = resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdAndVersionNumber(resumeId, versionB)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Version B not found"));
        return new ResumeVersionCompareResponse(toVersionResponse(va), toVersionResponse(vb));
    }

    private ResumeVersion createVersion(UUID resumeId, String content, UUID parentId) {
        int nextVersion = resumeVersionRepository.findTopByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resumeId)
                .map(v -> v.getVersionNumber() + 1)
                .orElse(1);

        ResumeVersion version = ResumeVersion.builder()
                .resumeId(resumeId)
                .versionNumber(nextVersion)
                .content(content)
                .parentVersionId(parentId)
                .build();
        return resumeVersionRepository.save(version);
    }

    private Resume getOwnedResume(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        Resume resume = resumeRepository.findById(resumeId)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
        if (!resume.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
            throw new BusinessException(ErrorCode.FORBIDDEN);
        }
        return resume;
    }

    private ResumeResponse toResponse(Resume resume) {
        ResumeVersion latest = resumeVersionRepository.findTopByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resume.getId())
                .orElse(null);
        return new ResumeResponse(
                resume.getId(),
                resume.getTitle(),
                resume.getCompanyName(),
                resume.getDescription(),
                latest != null ? latest.getVersionNumber() : null,
                latest != null ? latest.getContent() : null,
                resume.getCreatedAt(),
                resume.getUpdatedAt()
        );
    }

    private ResumeVersionResponse toVersionResponse(ResumeVersion v) {
        return new ResumeVersionResponse(
                v.getId(), v.getResumeId(), v.getVersionNumber(),
                v.getContent(), v.getMetadata(), v.getParentVersionId(), v.getCreatedAt()
        );
    }
}
```

### 4. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/presentation/controller/ResumeController.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.presentation.controller;

import com.resumepilot.application.resume.ResumeService;
import com.resumepilot.global.config.SecurityUtils;
import com.resumepilot.global.response.ApiResponse;
import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.resume.*;
import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.Operation;
import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.tags.Tag;
import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/v1/resumes")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Tag(name = "Resume")
public class ResumeController {

    private final ResumeService resumeService;

    @GetMapping
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 목록")
    public ApiResponse<List<ResumeResponse>> list() {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.list(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId()));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 상세")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeResponse> get(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.get(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id));
    }

    @PostMapping
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 생성")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeResponse> create(@Valid @RequestBody ResumeCreateRequest request) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.create(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), request));
    }

    @PatchMapping("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 수정")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeResponse> update(@PathVariable UUID id, @RequestBody ResumeUpdateRequest request) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.update(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id, request));
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 삭제")
    public ApiResponse<Void> delete(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        resumeService.delete(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id);
        return ApiResponse.ok(null);
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/versions")
    @Operation(summary = "새 버전 생성")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeVersionResponse> createVersion(
            @PathVariable UUID id,
            @Valid @RequestBody ResumeVersionCreateRequest request) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.createVersion(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id, request));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}/versions")
    @Operation(summary = "버전 목록")
    public ApiResponse<List<ResumeVersionResponse>> listVersions(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.listVersions(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}/versions/compare")
    @Operation(summary = "버전 비교")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeVersionCompareResponse> compareVersions(
            @PathVariable UUID id,
            @RequestParam int versionA,
            @RequestParam int versionB) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.compareVersions(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id, versionA, versionB));
    }
}
```

```java
package com.resumepilot.domain.company;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.*;
import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
import org.hibernate.annotations.JdbcTypeCode;
import org.hibernate.annotations.UpdateTimestamp;
import org.hibernate.type.SqlTypes;

import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

@Entity
@Table(name = "job_postings")
@Getter
@Setter
@NoArgsConstructor
@AllArgsConstructor
@Builder
public class JobPosting {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "user_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID userId;

    @Column(name = "company_id")
    private UUID companyId;

    private String title;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(name = "source_type", nullable = false)
    private JobSourceType sourceType;

    @Column(name = "source_url")
    private String sourceUrl;

    @Column(name = "raw_content", columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String rawContent;

    @JdbcTypeCode(SqlTypes.JSON)
    @Column(name = "parsed_json")
    @Builder.Default
    private Map<String, Object> parsedJson = Map.of();

    @CreationTimestamp
    @Column(name = "created_at", updatable = false)
    private Instant createdAt;

    @UpdateTimestamp
    @Column(name = "updated_at")
    private Instant updatedAt;
}
```

**참고 (id 타입 확인용):** `JobPosting.id`는 `UUID` (`@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)`)입니다. `Resume`에 `jobPostingId` 연관관계를 추가할 경우 `UUID jobPostingId` 타입으로 매핑하면 일관됩니다.

이 세션에서는 조사만 수행했고 파일 수정은 하지 않았습니다.
```

1	package com.resumepilot.application.resume;

3	import com.resumepilot.application.rag.RagService;
4	import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.Resume;
5	import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeRepository;
6	import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeVersion;
7	import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeVersionRepository;
8	import com.resumepilot.global.exception.BusinessException;
9	import com.resumepilot.global.exception.ErrorCode;
10	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.resume.*;
11	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
12	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
13	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
14	
15	import java.util.List;
16	import java.util.UUID;
17	
18	@Service
19	@RequiredArgsConstructor
20	public class ResumeService {
21	
22	    private final ResumeRepository resumeRepository;
23	    private final ResumeVersionRepository resumeVersionRepository;
24	    private final RagService ragService;
25	
26	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
27	    public List<ResumeResponse> list(UUID userId) {
28	        return resumeRepository.findByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId).stream()
29	                .map(this::toResponse)
30	                .toList();
31	    }
32	
33	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
34	    public ResumeResponse get(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
35	        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
36	        return toResponse(resume);
37	    }
38	
39	    @Transactional
40	    public ResumeResponse create(UUID userId, ResumeCreateRequest request) {
41	        Resume resume = Resume.builder()
42	                .userId(userId)
43	                .title(request.title())
44	                .companyName(request.companyName())
45	                .description(request.description())
46	                .build();
47	        resumeRepository.save(resume);
48	
49	        if (request.content() != null && !request.content().isBlank()) {
50	            ResumeVersion v = createVersion(resume.getId(), request.content(), null);
51	            ragService.embedResume(userId, v.getId(), v.getContent());
52	        }
53	        return toResponse(resume);
54	    }
55	
56	    @Transactional
57	    public ResumeResponse update(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, ResumeUpdateRequest request) {
58	        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
59	        if (request.title() != null) resume.setTitle(request.title());
60	        if (request.companyName() != null) resume.setCompanyName(request.companyName());
61	        if (request.description() != null) resume.setDescription(request.description());
62	        return toResponse(resume);
63	    }
64	
65	    @Transactional
66	    public void delete(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
67	        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
68	        resumeRepository.delete(resume);
69	    }
70	
71	    @Transactional
72	    public ResumeVersionResponse createVersion(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, ResumeVersionCreateRequest request) {
73	        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
74	        ResumeVersion v = createVersion(resumeId, request.content(), null);
75	        ragService.embedResume(userId, v.getId(), v.getContent());
76	        return toVersionResponse(v);
77	    }
78	
79	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
80	    public List<ResumeVersionResponse> listVersions(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
81	        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
82	        return resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resumeId).stream()
83	                .map(this::toVersionResponse)
84	                .toList();
85	    }
86	
87	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
88	    public ResumeVersionCompareResponse compareVersions(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, int versionA, int versionB) {
89	        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
90	        ResumeVersion va = resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdAndVersionNumber(resumeId, versionA)
91	                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Version A not found"));
92	        ResumeVersion vb = resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdAndVersionNumber(resumeId, versionB)
93	                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Version B not found"));
94	        return new ResumeVersionCompareResponse(toVersionResponse(va), toVersionResponse(vb));
95	    }
96	
97	    private ResumeVersion createVersion(UUID resumeId, String content, UUID parentId) {
98	        int nextVersion = resumeVersionRepository.findTopByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resumeId)
99	                .map(v -> v.getVersionNumber() + 1)
100	                .orElse(1);
101	
102	        ResumeVersion version = ResumeVersion.builder()
103	                .resumeId(resumeId)
104	                .versionNumber(nextVersion)
105	                .content(content)
106	                .parentVersionId(parentId)
107	                .build();
108	        return resumeVersionRepository.save(version);
109	    }
110	
111	    private Resume getOwnedResume(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
112	        Resume resume = resumeRepository.findById(resumeId)
113	                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
114	        if (!resume.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
115	            throw new BusinessException(ErrorCode.FORBIDDEN);
116	        }
117	        return resume;
118	    }
119	
120	    private ResumeResponse toResponse(Resume resume) {
121	        ResumeVersion latest = resumeVersionRepository.findTopByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resume.getId())
122	                .orElse(null);
123	        return new ResumeResponse(
124	                resume.getId(),
125	                resume.getTitle(),
126	                resume.getCompanyName(),
127	                resume.getDescription(),
128	                latest != null ? latest.getVersionNumber() : null,
129	                latest != null ? latest.getContent() : null,
130	                resume.getCreatedAt(),
131	                resume.getUpdatedAt()
132	        );
133	    }
134	
135	    private ResumeVersionResponse toVersionResponse(ResumeVersion v) {
136	        return new ResumeVersionResponse(
137	                v.getId(), v.getResumeId(), v.getVersionNumber(),
138	                v.getContent(), v.getMetadata(), v.getParentVersionId(), v.getCreatedAt()
139	        );
140	    }
141	}

Resume 관련 파일 전체 내용입니다. (조사만 수행, 코드 수정 없음)

### 1. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/resume/Resume.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.domain.resume;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.*;
import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
import org.hibernate.annotations.UpdateTimestamp;

import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.UUID;

@Entity
@Table(name = "resumes")
@Getter
@Setter
@NoArgsConstructor
@AllArgsConstructor
@Builder
public class Resume {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "user_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID userId;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String title;

    @Column(name = "company_name")
    private String companyName;

    private String description;

    @CreationTimestamp
    @Column(name = "created_at", updatable = false)
    private Instant createdAt;

    @UpdateTimestamp
    @Column(name = "updated_at")
    private Instant updatedAt;
}
```

### 2. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/resume/ResumeRepository.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.domain.resume;

import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

public interface ResumeRepository extends JpaRepository<Resume, UUID> {
    List<Resume> findByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(UUID userId);
}
```

(참고: 같은 패키지에 `ResumeVersion.java`, `ResumeVersionRepository.java`도 존재하지만 요청 범위(Resume 본체)는 위 파일들입니다.)

### 3. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/application/resume/ResumeService.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.application.resume;

import com.resumepilot.application.rag.RagService;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.Resume;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeRepository;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeVersion;
import com.resumepilot.domain.resume.ResumeVersionRepository;
import com.resumepilot.global.exception.BusinessException;
import com.resumepilot.global.exception.ErrorCode;
import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.resume.*;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class ResumeService {

    private final ResumeRepository resumeRepository;
    private final ResumeVersionRepository resumeVersionRepository;
    private final RagService ragService;

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public List<ResumeResponse> list(UUID userId) {
        return resumeRepository.findByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId).stream()
                .map(this::toResponse)
                .toList();
    }

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public ResumeResponse get(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        return toResponse(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public ResumeResponse create(UUID userId, ResumeCreateRequest request) {
        Resume resume = Resume.builder()
                .userId(userId)
                .title(request.title())
                .companyName(request.companyName())
                .description(request.description())
                .build();
        resumeRepository.save(resume);

        if (request.content() != null && !request.content().isBlank()) {
            ResumeVersion v = createVersion(resume.getId(), request.content(), null);
            ragService.embedResume(userId, v.getId(), v.getContent());
        }
        return toResponse(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public ResumeResponse update(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, ResumeUpdateRequest request) {
        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        if (request.title() != null) resume.setTitle(request.title());
        if (request.companyName() != null) resume.setCompanyName(request.companyName());
        if (request.description() != null) resume.setDescription(request.description());
        return toResponse(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public void delete(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        Resume resume = getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        resumeRepository.delete(resume);
    }

    @Transactional
    public ResumeVersionResponse createVersion(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, ResumeVersionCreateRequest request) {
        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        ResumeVersion v = createVersion(resumeId, request.content(), null);
        ragService.embedResume(userId, v.getId(), v.getContent());
        return toVersionResponse(v);
    }

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public List<ResumeVersionResponse> listVersions(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        return resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resumeId).stream()
                .map(this::toVersionResponse)
                .toList();
    }

    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
    public ResumeVersionCompareResponse compareVersions(UUID userId, UUID resumeId, int versionA, int versionB) {
        getOwnedResume(userId, resumeId);
        ResumeVersion va = resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdAndVersionNumber(resumeId, versionA)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Version A not found"));
        ResumeVersion vb = resumeVersionRepository.findByResumeIdAndVersionNumber(resumeId, versionB)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Version B not found"));
        return new ResumeVersionCompareResponse(toVersionResponse(va), toVersionResponse(vb));
    }

    private ResumeVersion createVersion(UUID resumeId, String content, UUID parentId) {
        int nextVersion = resumeVersionRepository.findTopByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resumeId)
                .map(v -> v.getVersionNumber() + 1)
                .orElse(1);

        ResumeVersion version = ResumeVersion.builder()
                .resumeId(resumeId)
                .versionNumber(nextVersion)
                .content(content)
                .parentVersionId(parentId)
                .build();
        return resumeVersionRepository.save(version);
    }

    private Resume getOwnedResume(UUID userId, UUID resumeId) {
        Resume resume = resumeRepository.findById(resumeId)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
        if (!resume.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
            throw new BusinessException(ErrorCode.FORBIDDEN);
        }
        return resume;
    }

    private ResumeResponse toResponse(Resume resume) {
        ResumeVersion latest = resumeVersionRepository.findTopByResumeIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(resume.getId())
                .orElse(null);
        return new ResumeResponse(
                resume.getId(),
                resume.getTitle(),
                resume.getCompanyName(),
                resume.getDescription(),
                latest != null ? latest.getVersionNumber() : null,
                latest != null ? latest.getContent() : null,
                resume.getCreatedAt(),
                resume.getUpdatedAt()
        );
    }

    private ResumeVersionResponse toVersionResponse(ResumeVersion v) {
        return new ResumeVersionResponse(
                v.getId(), v.getResumeId(), v.getVersionNumber(),
                v.getContent(), v.getMetadata(), v.getParentVersionId(), v.getCreatedAt()
        );
    }
}
```

### 4. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/presentation/controller/ResumeController.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.presentation.controller;

import com.resumepilot.application.resume.ResumeService;
import com.resumepilot.global.config.SecurityUtils;
import com.resumepilot.global.response.ApiResponse;
import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.resume.*;
import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.Operation;
import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.tags.Tag;
import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.UUID;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/v1/resumes")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Tag(name = "Resume")
public class ResumeController {

    private final ResumeService resumeService;

    @GetMapping
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 목록")
    public ApiResponse<List<ResumeResponse>> list() {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.list(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId()));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 상세")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeResponse> get(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.get(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id));
    }

    @PostMapping
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 생성")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeResponse> create(@Valid @RequestBody ResumeCreateRequest request) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.create(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), request));
    }

    @PatchMapping("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 수정")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeResponse> update(@PathVariable UUID id, @RequestBody ResumeUpdateRequest request) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.update(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id, request));
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "자기소개서 삭제")
    public ApiResponse<Void> delete(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        resumeService.delete(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id);
        return ApiResponse.ok(null);
    }

    @PostMapping("/{id}/versions")
    @Operation(summary = "새 버전 생성")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeVersionResponse> createVersion(
            @PathVariable UUID id,
            @Valid @RequestBody ResumeVersionCreateRequest request) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.createVersion(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id, request));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}/versions")
    @Operation(summary = "버전 목록")
    public ApiResponse<List<ResumeVersionResponse>> listVersions(@PathVariable UUID id) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.listVersions(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id));
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}/versions/compare")
    @Operation(summary = "버전 비교")
    public ApiResponse<ResumeVersionCompareResponse> compareVersions(
            @PathVariable UUID id,
            @RequestParam int versionA,
            @RequestParam int versionB) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(resumeService.compareVersions(SecurityUtils.getCurrentUserId(), id, versionA, versionB));
    }
}
```

### 7. `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/company/JobPosting.java`
```java
package com.resumepilot.domain.company;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.*;
import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
import org.hibernate.annotations.JdbcTypeCode;
import org.hibernate.annotations.UpdateTimestamp;
import org.hibernate.type.SqlTypes;

import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.UUID;

@Entity
@Table(name = "job_postings")
@Getter
@Setter
@NoArgsConstructor
@AllArgsConstructor
@Builder
public class JobPosting {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)
    private UUID id;

    @Column(name = "user_id", nullable = false)
    private UUID userId;

    @Column(name = "company_id")
    private UUID companyId;

    private String title;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(name = "source_type", nullable = false)
    private JobSourceType sourceType;

    @Column(name = "source_url")
    private String sourceUrl;

    @Column(name = "raw_content", columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String rawContent;

    @JdbcTypeCode(SqlTypes.JSON)
    @Column(name = "parsed_json")
    @Builder.Default
    private Map<String, Object> parsedJson = Map.of();

    @CreationTimestamp
    @Column(name = "created_at", updatable = false)
    private Instant createdAt;

    @UpdateTimestamp
    @Column(name = "updated_at")
    private Instant updatedAt;
}
```

**참고 (id 타입 확인용):** `JobPosting.id`는 `UUID` (`@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)`)입니다. `Resume`에 `jobPostingId` 연관관계를 추가할 경우 `UUID jobPostingId` 타입으로 매핑하면 일관됩니다.

이 세션에서는 조사만 수행했고 파일 수정은 하지 않았습니다.

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-15 15:36:16Z)**_

백엔드도 컴파일 성공 (테스트 실행러가 이 Windows 환경에서 워커 프로세스 이슈로 죽는 건 기존 환경 문제로 보이고, 코드 변경과 무관합니다 — `compileJava`/`compileTestJava`는 정상 통과).

## 이번에 한 작업

기존에 워크스페이스에서 저장한 결과가 **공고를 다시 선택해도** 안 보이던 문제 — 백엔드 자기소개서(Resume)가 공고(JobPosting)와 아예 연결되어 있지 않았던 게 원인입니다. 추가한 것:

- **DB**: `V27__resume_job_posting.sql` — `resumes.job_posting_id` 컬럼 추가 (FK → job_postings)
- **백엔드**: `Resume` 엔티티/`ResumeRepository`/`ResumeService`/`ResumeController`/DTO에 `jobPostingId` 반영, `GET /api/v1/resumes?jobPostingId=` 필터 추가
- **프론트**: `api.ts`의 `createResume`/`listResumes`가 `jobPostingId`를 주고받도록 수정. [WorkspacePage.tsx](resume-web/src/pages/WorkspacePage.tsx)에서:
  - "내 자기소개서에 저장" 클릭 시 선택된 공고의 `jobPostingId`를 함께 저장
  - 공고를 선택하면 그 공고로 **백엔드에 저장된 자기소개서가 있는지 조회**해서, 로컬에 없으면 자동으로 결과 패널에 불러와 표시

**적용하려면**: resume-api를 재시작해서 Flyway 마이그레이션(V27)이 적용되게 해주세요. 이후 워크스페이스에서 공고를 선택하고 "내 자기소개서에 저장"을 눌러야 대시보드/공고별 조회에 나타납니다 (그 이전 localStorage에만 있던 결과는 저장 버튼을 한 번 눌러줘야 DB로 넘어갑니다).

참고로 같은 제목("chemtopia_채용공고.png")의 공고가 DB에 **2개** 있어서, 예전 저장 데이터가 그중 어느 것과 매칭되는지 자동으로 단정하기 어렵습니다.

**가장 간단한 해결**: 지금 워크스페이스에서 그 공고를 선택한 상태로 "내 자기소개서에 저장"을 다시 한 번 눌러주세요. 이제는 `jobPostingId`가 제대로 함께 저장되므로, 그다음부터는 그 공고를 선택할 때마다 자동으로 결과가 나옵니다. (기존 미연결 레코드는 대시보드 전체 목록엔 계속 남아있고 그냥 무해한 중복이니 필요 없으면 나중에 삭제하셔도 됩니다.)

137	async function request<T>(path: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {
138	  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
139	    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
140	    ...(options.headers as Record<string, string>),
141	  };
142	  const token = getAccessToken();
143	  if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
144	
145	  let response = await fetch(`${API_URL}${path}`, { ...options, headers });
146	
147	  const shouldRefresh =
148	    response.status === 401 && getRefreshToken() && !path.includes('/auth/');
149	
150	  if (shouldRefresh) {
151	    const refreshRes = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/v1/auth/refresh`, {
152	      method: 'POST',
153	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
154	      body: JSON.stringify({ refreshToken: getRefreshToken() }),
155	    });
156	    if (refreshRes.ok) {
157	      const refreshed: ApiResponse<TokenResponse> = await refreshRes.json();
158	      setTokens(refreshed.data.accessToken, refreshed.data.refreshToken);
159	      headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${refreshed.data.accessToken}`;
160	      response = await fetch(`${API_URL}${path}`, { ...options, headers });
161	    } else {
162	      clearTokens();
163	      if (!path.includes('/auth/')) {
164	        window.location.href = '/login';
165	      }
166	      throw new Error('Session expired');
167	    }
168	  }
169	
170	  if (response.status === 401) {
171	    clearTokens();
172	    if (!path.includes('/auth/')) {
173	      window.location.href = '/login';
174	    }
175	    throw new Error('Authentication required');
176	  }

12	class GenerationService:
13	    """자기소개서 생성 오케스트레이션 — LangChain LCEL 체인.
14	
15	    RAG(context) -> Prompt(render, prompt-service만 사용) -> LLM -> 후처리.

19	    def __init__(self) -> None:
20	        self._chain = (
21	            RunnableLambda(self._build_context)
22	            | RunnableLambda(self._render_prompt)
23	            | RunnableLambda(self._generate)
24	            | RunnableLambda(self._postprocess)
25	        )
26	
27	    async def generate_resume(self, request: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
28	        state = await self._chain.ainvoke({"request": request})
29	        return state["response"]

31	    async def _build_context(self, state: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
32	        request = state["request"]
33	        rag_context: dict[str, Any] = {"context": {"experiences": [], "writing_styles": []}}
34	        try:

44	        writing_styles = context.get("writing_styles", [])
45	        return {
46	            **state,
47	            "experiences": experiences,
48	            "style_text": writing_styles[0].get("content", "") if writing_styles else "",
49	        }

51	    async def _render_prompt(self, state: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
52	        request = state["request"]
53	        experiences = state["experiences"]
54	        style_text = state["style_text"]
55	        job_analysis = request.get("job_analysis")
56	        rewrite_level = request.get("rewrite_level", 40)

58	        section_titles_text = (
59	            "\n".join(f"{i + 1}. {title}" for i, title in enumerate(section_titles))
60	            if section_titles else ""
61	        )
62	        try:
63	            prompt = await prompt_client.render("RESUME_GENERATION", {
64	                "experiences": str(experiences),
65	                "job_analysis": str(job_analysis),
66	                "writing_style": style_text,
67	                "rewrite_level": rewrite_level,
68	                "section_titles": section_titles_text,
69	            })
70	        except Exception as exc:
71	            logger.warning("Prompt render failed: %s", exc)
72	            prompt = {
73	                "system_prompt": "You rewrite cover letters using ONLY the user's provided experiences.",
74	                "user_prompt": (

76	                    f"Style:\n{style_text}\n\nRewrite level: {rewrite_level}%"
77	                ),
78	            }
79	        return {**state, "prompt": prompt}
80	
81	    async def _generate(self, state: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
82	        request = state["request"]
83	        prompt = state["prompt"]
84	        result = await llm_service.generate_with_context(
85	            experiences=state["experiences"],
86	            rewrite_level=request.get("rewrite_level", 40),

88	            writing_style=state["style_text"],
89	            system_prompt=prompt["system_prompt"],
90	            user_prompt=prompt["user_prompt"],
91	        )
92	        return {**state, "result": result}
93	
94	    async def _postprocess(self, state: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
95	        request = state["request"]
96	        result = state["result"]
97	        rewrite_level = request.get("rewrite_level", 40)
98	
99	        forbidden = request.get("forbidden_expressions", [])
100	        if forbidden and result.get("content"):
101	            result["content"] = self._apply_forbidden(str(result["content"]), forbidden)
102	
103	        detections = rule_based.detect_ai_traces(result["content"], forbidden) if not result.get("insufficient") else []
104	        reviews = rule_based.review_feedback(result["content"]) if not result.get("insufficient") else []
105	
106	        response = {
107	            **result,
108	            "rewrite_level": rewrite_level,
109	            "quality_scores": self._score(result["content"], detections),
110	            "detections": detections,
111	            "reviews": reviews,
112	        }
113	        return {**state, "response": response}
114	
115	    def _apply_forbidden(self, content: str, forbidden: list) -> str:
116	        for expr in forbidden:
117	            if expr and str(expr) in content:
118	                content = content.replace(str(expr), "")
119	        return content
120	
121	    def _score(self, content: str, detections: list[dict]) -> dict[str, float]:
122	        red_count = sum(1 for d in detections if d["level"] == "RED")
123	        total = max(len(detections), 1)
124	        ai_trace = round(red_count / total * 100, 1)
125	        return {
126	            "naturalness": max(0, 100 - ai_trace),
127	            "company_fit": 85.0,
128	            "style_retention": 90.0,
129	            "ai_trace_percent": ai_trace,
130	            "star_application": 80.0,
131	            "experience_utilization": 95.0 if content else 0,
132	        }

224	        resume_words = set(resume_content.lower().split())
225	        job_set = set(k.lower() for k in job_keywords)
226	        matched = job_set & resume_words
227	        missing = job_set - resume_words
228	        return {
229	            "matched": list(matched),
230	            "missing": list(missing),
231	            "recommended": list(missing)[:5],
232	            "overused": [],

25	class RuleBasedGenerator:
26	    def generate_resume(
27	        self,
28	        experiences: list[dict],
29	        rewrite_level: int,
30	        job_analysis: dict | None = None,
31	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
32	        if not experiences:
33	            return {
34	                "content": "내용이 부족하여 생성하지 않음",
35	                "experience_ids": [],
36	                "insufficient": True,
37	            }
38	
39	        company = (job_analysis or {}).get("company_name", "해당 기업")
40	        paragraphs = []
41	        for exp in experiences[:3]:
42	            content = exp.get("content") or exp.get("title", "")
43	            if content:
44	                paragraphs.append(content.strip())
45	
46	        if not paragraphs:
47	            return {
48	                "content": "내용이 부족하여 생성하지 않음",
49	                "experience_ids": [e.get("entity_id") for e in experiences],
50	                "insufficient": True,
51	            }
52	
53	        header = f"{company} 지원을 위해 아래 경험을 바탕으로 작성했습니다.\n\n"
54	        body = "\n\n".join(paragraphs)
55	        if rewrite_level >= 60:
56	            body = self._restructure(body)
57	        content = header + body
58	
59	        return {
60	            "content": content,
61	            "experience_ids": [e.get("entity_id") for e in experiences if e.get("entity_id")],
62	            "insufficient": False,
63	        }
64	
65	    def detect_ai_traces(self, content: str, forbidden: list[str] | None = None) -> list[dict]:
66	        forbidden = forbidden or []
67	        sentences = [s.strip() for s in re.split(r"[.!?]\s*", content) if s.strip()]
68	        results = []
69	        for i, sentence in enumerate(sentences):
70	            level = "GREEN"
71	            reason = "자연스러운 표현"
72	            for expr in forbidden:
73	                if expr and expr in sentence:
74	                    level = "RED"
75	                    reason = f"AI 특유 표현 감지: '{expr}'"
76	                    break
77	            if level == "GREEN" and len(sentence) > 120:
78	                level = "YELLOW"
79	                reason = "문장이 다소 길어 수정 권장"
80	            results.append({
81	                "sentence_index": i,
82	                "sentence": sentence,
83	                "level": level,
84	                "reason": reason,
85	                "suggestion": sentence.replace("최선을 다하겠습니다", "목표 달성을 위해") if level != "GREEN" else None,
86	            })
87	        return results
88	
89	    def review_feedback(self, content: str) -> list[dict]:
90	        paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in content.split("\n\n") if p.strip()]
91	        reviews = []
92	        for i, para in enumerate(paragraphs):
93	            has_number = bool(re.search(r"\d+", para))
94	            reviews.append({
95	                "paragraph_index": i,
96	                "strengths": ["구체적 경험 포함"] if has_number else ["경험 기반 서술"],
97	                "weaknesses": [] if has_number else ["수치 기반 성과 부족"],
98	                "company_fit": "보통",
99	                "specificity": "높음" if has_number else "보통",
100	                "persuasiveness": "보통",
101	                "star_applied": "STAR" in para or has_number,
102	                "improvement": "성과에 숫자를 추가하면 설득력이 높아집니다." if not has_number else "현재 수준 유지",
103	                "suggestion": para,
104	            })
105	        return reviews
106	
107	    def _restructure(self, text: str) -> str:
108	        lines = text.split("\n")
109	        return "\n".join(f"- {line}" if line and not line.startswith("-") else line for line in lines)
110	
111

123

128	    async def has_routes(self, operation: str) -> bool:
129	        routes = await self._resolve_routes(operation)
130	        return len(routes) > 0
131	
132	    async def complete_for_operation(
133	        self,
134	        operation: str,
135	        system: str,
136	        user: str,
137	        temperature: float = 0.7,
138	    ) -> LlmCompletion:
139	        routes = await self._resolve_routes(operation)
140	        if not routes:
141	            return LlmCompletion(content="")
142	
143	        last_error: Exception | None = None
144	        for route in routes:
145	            try:
146	                content = await self._chat(route, system, user, temperature, operation)
147	                return LlmCompletion(content=content, model=route.model_name)
148	            except Exception as exc:
149	                if not self._is_retryable(exc):
150	                    raise
151	                logger.warning(
152	                    "LLM route failed (%s / %s): %s",
153	                    route.provider_slug,
154	                    route.model_name,
155	                    exc,
156	                )
157	                last_error = exc
158	        if last_error:
159	            raise last_error
160	        return LlmCompletion(content="")
161

163	        self,

169	        completion = await self.complete_for_operation(operation, system, user, temperature=temperature)
170	        return self.parse_json_response(completion.content), completion.model

172	    async def complete_with_image_for_operation(

205	                    route.model_name,
206	                    exc,
207	                )
208	                last_error = exc
209	        if last_error:
210	            raise last_error
211	        return LlmCompletion(content="")
212	
213	    async def complete_with_image_json_for_operation(
214	        self,
215	        operation: str,
216	        system: str,
217	        user_text: str,
218	        image_data_url: str,
219	        temperature: float = 0.2,
220	    ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any] | None, str | None]:
221	        completion = await self.complete_with_image_for_operation(
222	            operation, system, user_text, image_data_url, temperature=temperature,
223	        )
224	        return self.parse_json_response(completion.content), completion.model
225	
226	    def parse_json_value(self, text: str) -> dict[str, Any] | list[Any] | None:
227	        """LLM 응답에서 JSON 값을 추출한다. dict와 list(배열 프롬프트 출력) 모두 허용."""
228	        cleaned = text.strip()
229	        if cleaned.startswith("```"):
230	            cleaned = re.sub(r"^```(?:json)?\s*", "", cleaned)
231	            cleaned = re.sub(r"\s*```$", "", cleaned)
232	        try:
233	            parsed = json.loads(cleaned)
234	            return parsed if isinstance(parsed, (dict, list)) else None
235	        except json.JSONDecodeError:
236	            return None
237	
238	    def parse_json_response(self, text: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
239	        parsed = self.parse_json_value(text)
240	        return parsed if isinstance(parsed, dict) else None
241	
242	    async def generate_with_context(
243	        self,
244	        experiences: list[dict],
245	        rewrite_level: int,
246	        job_analysis: dict | None,
247	        writing_style: str,
248	        system_prompt: str,
249	        user_prompt: str,
250	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
251	        if not experiences:
252	            fallback = self._fallback.generate_resume([], rewrite_level, job_analysis)
253	            fallback["model"] = RULE_BASED_MODEL
254	            return fallback
255	
256	        exp_text = "\n".join(
257	            f"- [{e.get('entity_id', 'unknown')}] {e.get('content', '')}"
258	            for e in experiences if e.get("content")
259	        )
260	        if not exp_text.strip():
261	            fallback = self._fallback.generate_resume(experiences, rewrite_level, job_analysis)
262	            fallback["model"] = RULE_BASED_MODEL
263	            return fallback
264	
265	        user_msg = user_prompt.replace("{{experiences}}", exp_text)
266	        user_msg = user_msg.replace("{{rewrite_level}}", str(rewrite_level))
267	        user_msg = user_msg.replace("{{writing_style}}", writing_style or "사용자 기본 문체")
268	        user_msg = user_msg.replace("{{job_analysis}}", str(job_analysis or {}))
269	
270	        try:
271	            if not await self.has_routes("GENERATE"):
272	                fallback = self._fallback.generate_resume(experiences, rewrite_level, job_analysis)
273	                fallback["model"] = RULE_BASED_MODEL
274	                return fallback
275	            completion = await self.complete_for_operation("GENERATE", system_prompt, user_msg)
276	        except Exception as exc:
277	            logger.warning("LLM generate failed, using rule fallback: %s", exc)
278	            fallback = self._fallback.generate_resume(experiences, rewrite_level, job_analysis)
279	            fallback["model"] = RULE_BASED_MODEL
280	            return fallback
281	
282	        return {
283	            "content": completion.content,
284	            "experience_ids": [e.get("entity_id") for e in experiences if e.get("entity_id")],
285	            "insufficient": False,
286	            "model": completion.model,
287	        }
288	
289	    async def _resolve_routes(self, operation: str) -> list[LlmRoute]:
290	        routes = await provider_router.routes_for(operation)
291	        if routes:
292	            return routes
293	        return provider_router.env_fallback_routes(operation)
294	
295	    def _model_for(
296	        self,
297	        route: LlmRoute,
298	        temperature: float,
299	        operation: str = "",
300	        default_max_tokens: int | None = None,
301	    ) -> ChatOpenAI:
302	        kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
303	            "model": route.model_name,
304	            "api_key": route.api_key,
305	            "temperature": temperature,
306	        }
307	        if route.base_url:
308	            kwargs["base_url"] = route.base_url
309	        max_tokens = OPERATION_MAX_TOKENS.get(operation, default_max_tokens)
310	        if max_tokens:
311	            kwargs["max_tokens"] = max_tokens
312	        return ChatOpenAI(**kwargs)
313	
314	    def _message_text(self, message: BaseMessage) -> str:
315	        content = message.content
316	        if isinstance(content, str):
317	            return content
318	        if isinstance(content, list):
319	            return "".join(
320	                part.get("text", "") if isinstance(part, dict) else str(part)
321	                for part in content
322	            )
323	        return str(content or "")
324	
325	    async def _chat(self, route: LlmRoute, system: str, user: str, temperature: float, operation: str = "") -> str:
326	        model = self._model_for(route, temperature, operation)
327	        response = await model.ainvoke([
328	            SystemMessage(content=system),
329	            HumanMessage(content=user),
330	        ])
331	        return self._message_text(response)
332	
333	    def _is_retryable(self, exc: Exception) -> bool:
334	        if isinstance(exc, RateLimitError):
335	            return True
336	        if isinstance(exc, APIStatusError) and exc.status_code in {401, 403, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504}:
337	            return True
338	        return False
339

341	rule_based = RuleBasedGenerator()

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-15 16:05:53Z)**_

두 가지를 확인했습니다.

**1. 콘솔 401 에러 — 실제 오류 아님, 정상 동작**
`resume-web/src/lib/api.ts:137-176`의 `request()` 함수는 access token 만료 시 401을 받으면 자동으로 refresh token으로 재시도합니다. 화면에 자기소개서 결과가 정상적으로 나온 걸 보면 재시도가 성공한 것 — 브라우저 Network 탭은 재시도 성공 여부와 무관하게 **첫 실패 요청을 그대로 로그**해서 마치 오류처럼 보이는 것뿐입니다. 기능상 문제는 없습니다.

**2. 점수(자연스러움 100 / 기업 적합도 85 / 문체 유지도 90 / STAR 80 / 경험 활용도 95)가 "규칙 기반"인 게 맞습니다 — 진짜 문제**

`resume-ai/app/services/generation_service.py:121-132`:
```python
def _score(self, content, detections):
    ...
    return {
        "naturalness": max(0, 100 - ai_trace),      # 문장 길이 기반 규칙
        "company_fit": 85.0,                         # 하드코딩 고정값
        "style_retention": 90.0,                      # 하드코딩 고정값
        "ai_trace_percent": ai_trace,                 # 문장 길이 기반 규칙
        "star_application": 80.0,                     # 하드코딩 고정값
        "experience_utilization": 95.0 if content else 0,  # 사실상 고정값
    }
```
자기소개서 **본문 자체**는 실제 LLM이 생성한 것으로 보이지만(규칙 기반 생성기는 경험 원문을 그대로 이어붙이는 형태라 지금 결과물과 다름), **점수 6개 중 4개(기업 적합도·문체 유지도·STAR·경험 활용도)는 내용과 무관하게 항상 같은 숫자**가 나가도록 만들어져 있습니다. AI 흔적 탐지·첨삭(review)도 실제 LLM 프롬프트(`AI_DETECTION`, `AI_REVIEW`)가 있지만 실패 시에만 규칙 기반으로 폴백하고, 점수(`_score`)는 애초에 LLM 평가 자체가 구현 안 돼 있어서 매번 똑같이 나옵니다.

CLAUDE.md 원칙("AI는 지어내지 않는다")에 비춰보면 이 부분은 실제로 손봐야 할 부분인데, 프롬프트-서비스에 새 평가용 프롬프트를 추가하고 LLM 호출로 대체하는 작업이라 범위가 좀 있습니다.

`generation_service.py:121-132`의 `_score()` 함수를 보면:
- `company_fit`, `style_retention`, `star_application`, `experience_utilization` — 이 4개는 함수 안에서 `content`나 `job_analysis`, `experiences`를 **아예 들여다보지 않고** `85.0`, `90.0`, `80.0`, `95.0`을 그냥 리턴합니다. 실제 자소서 텍스트와 공고 데이터를 인자로 받지만 이 계산에는 안 씀.

1	import logging

15	    provider_slug: str
16	    base_url: str
17	    api_key: str
18	    model_name: str
19	    priority: int

21	
22	class ProviderRouter:
23	    def __init__(self) -> None:
24	        self._cache: dict[str, list[LlmRoute]] = {}
25	        self._loaded_at = 0.0
26	        self._ttl_seconds = 60
27	
28	    async def routes_for(self, operation: str) -> list[LlmRoute]:
29	        await self._ensure_loaded()
30	        return list(self._cache.get(operation, []))
31	
32	    def env_fallback_routes(self, operation: str) -> list[LlmRoute]:
33	        if not settings.openai_api_key:
34	            return []
35	        return [
36	            LlmRoute(
37	                provider_slug="env",
38	                base_url=settings.openai_base_url or "https://api.openai.com/v1",
39	                api_key=settings.openai_api_key,
40	                model_name=settings.openai_model,
41	                priority=1,
42	            )
43	        ]
44	
45	    async def _ensure_loaded(self) -> None:
46	        if time.time() - self._loaded_at < self._ttl_seconds and self._cache:
47	            return
48	        if not settings.resume_api_url or not settings.internal_api_token:
49	            self._cache = {}
50	            self._loaded_at = time.time()
51	            return
52	        url = f"{settings.resume_api_url.rstrip('/')}/api/v1/internal/llm/runtime-config"
53	        try:
54	            async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=10.0) as client:
55	                response = await client.get(
56	                    url,
57	                    headers={"X-Internal-Token": settings.internal_api_token},
58	                )
59	                response.raise_for_status()
60	                payload: dict[str, Any] = response.json()["data"]["routes"]
61	            loaded: dict[str, list[LlmRoute]] = {}
62	            for operation, items in payload.items():
63	                loaded[operation] = [
64	                    LlmRoute(
65	                        provider_slug=item["providerSlug"],
66	                        base_url=item.get("baseUrl") or "",
67	                        api_key=item["apiKey"],
68	                        model_name=item["modelName"],
69	                        priority=item.get("priority", 1),
70	                    )
71	                    for item in items
72	                ]
73	            self._cache = loaded
74	            self._loaded_at = time.time()
75	            logger.info("Loaded LLM runtime routes from resume-api")
76	        except Exception as exc:
77	            logger.warning("Failed to load LLM routes from resume-api: %s", exc)
78	            self._cache = {}
79	            self._loaded_at = time.time()
80	
81	
82	provider_router = ProviderRouter()

좋은 질문이고, 두 가지를 구분해야 합니다.

**점수 6개(자연스러움/기업 적합도/문체 유지도/AI흔적/STAR/경험 활용도)** → 이건 "가끔 제대로" 되는 게 아니라 **항상 고정**입니다. `_score()` 함수 자체가 LLM을 아예 호출하지 않고 숫자를 박아뒀기 때문에, 데이터가 많든 적든 매번 85/90/80/95로 똑같이 나옵니다. (naturalness/AI흔적만 문장 길이 규칙으로 미세하게 변함)

**첨삭(장점/단점)·AI 흔적 탐지** → 이건 다릅니다. DB를 확인해보니 실제로 `AI_REVIEW`, `AI_DETECTION` 둘 다 Gemini 2.5 Flash를 1순위로 실제 LLM 라우팅이 설정돼 있습니다(`llm_model_routes` 테이블 확인). 즉 이 부분은 진짜 AI가 평가하도록 구현은 돼 있습니다.

문제는 `resume-ai/app/services/generation_service.py`의 `ReviewService.review()` (181-207행) 로직인데:

```python
completion = await llm_service.complete_for_operation("AI_REVIEW", ...)
parsed = llm_service.parse_json_value(completion.content)
reviews = parsed if isinstance(parsed, list) else parsed.get("reviews")
if isinstance(reviews, list) and reviews:
    return {...}  # 진짜 LLM 결과
# ↓ 여기로 빠지면 아무 로그도 안 남기고 조용히 폴백
return {"reviews": rule_based.review_feedback(content), ...}
```

**LLM이 응답은 했지만 JSON 파싱이 실패하면(마크다운 설명을 덧붙이거나, max_tokens=2048에 걸려 잘리거나, 배열이 비어있으면) 아무 경고 로그도 없이 조용히 규칙 기반 템플릿으로 대체됩니다.** 지금 화면에 보였던 "장점: 경험 기반 서술 / 단점: 수치 기반 성과 부족" 문구가 바로 그 규칙 기반 템플릿 원문(`llm_service.py:96-102`)과 정확히 일치했습니다.

그래서 "가끔은 제대로"인 이유 — LLM 응답이 깔끔한 JSON으로 오면 진짜 첨삭이 나오고, JSON 파싱에 실패하면 조용히 가짜(규칙 기반) 첨삭으로 바뀌는데 **사용자에게 어느 쪽인지 구분해서 보여주지 않기 때문**입니다.

정리하면 두 가지 근본 문제:
1. 점수 4개는 애초에 LLM 평가 로직이 없음 (구현 필요)
2. 첨삭/탐지는 LLM 호출은 있지만 실패 시 무로그·무표시로 조용히 폴백함 (최소한 `model` 필드가 `rule-based`인지 확인해서 화면에 "AI 평가 실패, 참고용 기본 피드백"처럼 표시하거나, 로그를 남겨야 함)

원하시면 (1) 점수 계산을 실제 LLM 프롬프트로 구현하고, (2) 폴백 시 로그/표시를 추가하는 작업을 진행할까요?

네, 두 개 다 필요합니다 — 서로 다른 문제라서 하나만 고쳐선 안 됩니다.

- **점수 4개(기업 적합도/문체 유지도/STAR/경험 활용도)**: 지금은 LLM 호출 자체가 없으니 **새로 만들어야** 함. `AI_REVIEW` 프롬프트 결과(강점/약점/구체성 등)를 활용해 LLM이 직접 0~100 점수를 매기도록 확장하는 게 제일 효율적 — `AI_REVIEW`를 이미 호출하고 있으니, 그 프롬프트 응답에 점수 필드를 추가로 요청하면 별도 LLM 호출을 늘리지 않고 해결됩니다.
- **첨삭/AI흔적 탐지의 조용한 폴백**: 이미 LLM 호출이 있으니 **로직만 고치면 됨** — JSON 파싱 실패 시 로그를 남기고, 응답에 `model: "rule-based"` 표시가 있으면 프론트에서 "AI 평가 실패 — 참고용 기본 결과" 같은 배지를 보여줘서 사용자가 진짜 AI 평가인지 구분할 수 있게 함.

이 둘을 안 고치면: 점수는 계속 가짜고, 첨삭도 실패할 때마다 사용자 모르게 가짜로 바뀌는 상태가 유지됩니다. CLAUDE.md 원칙("AI는 지어내지 않는다")과도 어긋나는 부분이라 둘 다 고치는 걸 추천합니다.

진행할까요? (범위: `prompt-service`의 `AI_REVIEW` 프롬프트 템플릿에 점수 필드 추가 + DB 시드 업데이트, `resume-ai`의 파싱/폴백 로직 수정, 프론트에 폴백 여부 표시)

46	        payload.put("forbidden_expressions", getForbiddenList());

48	        Map<String, Object> result = aiGatewayClient.generateResume(payload);
49	        logUsage(userId, "generate", start, result != null, str(result != null ? result.get("model") : null));
50	
51	        if (result != null) {
52	            validateExperienceIds(userId, result);
53	            AiGeneration gen = AiGeneration.builder()
54	                    .userId(userId)
55	                    .jobPostingId(request.jobPostingId())
56	                    .rewriteLevel(request.rewriteLevel())
57	                    .inputContext(Map.of("keywords", request.keywords(), "job_analysis", request.jobAnalysis() != null ? request.jobAnalysis() : Map.of()))
58	                    .outputContent(String.valueOf(result.get("content")))
59	                    .qualityScores(castMap(result.get("quality_scores")))
60	                    .experienceIds(toStringList(result.get("experience_ids")))
61	                    .build();
62	            generationRepository.save(gen);
63	            result.put("generation_id", gen.getId().toString());
64	            persistArtifacts(gen.getId(), result);
65	        }
66	        return result;
67	    }

70	        long start = System.currentTimeMillis();

104	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
105	    public List<AiGenerationResponse> myGenerations(UUID userId) {
106	        return generationRepository.findTop20ByUserIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(userId).stream()
107	                .map(g -> new AiGenerationResponse(g.getId(), g.getOutputContent(), g.getRewriteLevel(),
108	                        g.getQualityScores(), g.getExperienceIds(), g.getCreatedAt()))
109	                .toList();
110	    }
111	
112	    private void validateExperienceIds(UUID userId, Map<String, Object> result) {
113	        List<String> returned = toStringList(result.get("experience_ids"));
114	        if (returned.isEmpty()) return;
115	
116	        Set<String> owned = new HashSet<>();
117	        experienceRepository.findByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId)
118	                .forEach(e -> owned.add(e.getId().toString()));
119	
120	        List<String> invalid = returned.stream().filter(id -> !owned.contains(id)).toList();
121	        if (!invalid.isEmpty()) {
122	            result.put("validation_warning", "허용되지 않은 경험 ID가 포함되어 제거했습니다: " + invalid);
123	            List<String> valid = returned.stream().filter(owned::contains).toList();
124	            result.put("experience_ids", valid);
125	            if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(result.get("insufficient")) == false && valid.isEmpty()) {
126	                result.put("content", "내용이 부족하여 생성하지 않음");
127	                result.put("insufficient", true);
128	            }
129	        }
130	    }
131	
132	    private void persistArtifacts(UUID generationId, Map<String, Object> result) {
133	        Object detections = result.get("detections");
134	        if (detections instanceof List<?> list) {
135	            for (Object item : list) {
136	                if (item instanceof Map<?, ?> d) {
137	                    detectionRepository.save(AiDetection.builder()
138	                            .generationId(generationId)
139	                            .sentenceIndex(intVal(d.get("sentence_index")))
140	                            .sentence(String.valueOf(d.get("sentence")))
141	                            .level(String.valueOf(d.get("level")))
142	                            .reason(d.get("reason") != null ? String.valueOf(d.get("reason")) : null)
143	                            .suggestion(d.get("suggestion") != null ? String.valueOf(d.get("suggestion")) : null)
144	                            .build());
145	                }
146	            }
147	        }
148	        Object reviews = result.get("reviews");
149	        if (reviews instanceof List<?> list) {
150	            for (Object item : list) {
151	                if (item instanceof Map<?, ?> r) {
152	                    reviewRepository.save(AiReview.builder()
153	                            .generationId(generationId)
154	                            .paragraphIndex(intVal(r.get("paragraph_index")))
155	                            .strengths(toStringList(r.get("strengths")))
156	                            .weaknesses(toStringList(r.get("weaknesses")))
157	                            .companyFit(str(r.get("company_fit")))
158	                            .specificity(str(r.get("specificity")))
159	                            .persuasiveness(str(r.get("persuasiveness")))
160	                            .starApplied(Boolean.TRUE.equals(r.get("star_applied")))
161	                            .improvement(str(r.get("improvement")))
162	                            .suggestion(str(r.get("suggestion")))
163	                            .build());
164	                }
165	            }
166	        }
167	    }
168	
169	    private int intVal(Object o) {
170	        return o instanceof Number n ? n.intValue() : 0;
171	    }
172	
173	    private String str(Object o) {
174	        return o != null ? String.valueOf(o) : null;
175	    }
176	
177	    private List<String> getForbiddenList() {
178	        return forbiddenRepository.findByEnabledTrue().stream()
179	                .map(f -> f.getExpression()).toList();
180	    }
181	
182	    private void logUsage(UUID userId, String operation, long startMs, boolean success, String model) {
183	        usageLogRepository.save(AiUsageLog.builder()
184	                .userId(userId)
185	                .service("resume-ai")
186	                .operation(operation)
187	                .model(model)
188	                .durationMs((int) (System.currentTimeMillis() - startMs))
189	                .status(success ? "SUCCESS" : "FAILED")
190	                .build());
191	    }
192	
193	    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
194	    private Map<String, Object> castMap(Object o) {
195	        return o instanceof Map ? (Map<String, Object>) o : Map.of();
196	    }
197	
198	    private List<String> toStringList(Object o) {
199	        if (o instanceof List<?> list) return list.stream().map(String::valueOf).toList();
200	        return List.of();
201	    }
202	}

1	import json
2	import re
3	from typing import Any
4	
5	import asyncpg
6	from openai import OpenAI
7	
8	from app.config import settings
9	
10	
11	class PromptRepository:
12	    def __init__(self) -> None:
13	        self._pool: asyncpg.Pool | None = None
14	
15	    async def connect(self) -> None:
16	        if self._pool is None:
17	            self._pool = await asyncpg.create_pool(settings.database_url, min_size=1, max_size=5)
18	
19	    async def close(self) -> None:
20	        if self._pool:
21	            await self._pool.close()
22	            self._pool = None
23	
24	    async def get_active_prompt(self, prompt_type: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
25	        await self.connect()
26	        assert self._pool is not None
27	        row = await self._pool.fetchrow(
28	            """
29	            SELECT pv.id, pv.version_number, pv.system_prompt, pv.user_prompt, pv.variables
30	            FROM prompt_templates pt
31	            JOIN prompt_versions pv ON pv.id = pt.active_version_id
32	            WHERE pt.type = $1
33	            """,
34	            prompt_type,
35	        )
36	        if not row:
37	            return self._default_prompt(prompt_type)
38	        return {
39	            "id": str(row["id"]),
40	            "version_number": row["version_number"],
41	            "system_prompt": row["system_prompt"],
42	            "user_prompt": row["user_prompt"],
43	            "variables": json.loads(row["variables"]) if row["variables"] else [],
44	        }
45	
46	    async def list_versions(self, prompt_type: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
47	        await self.connect()
48	        assert self._pool is not None
49	        rows = await self._pool.fetch(
50	            """
51	            SELECT pv.id, pv.version_number, pv.is_active, pv.created_at
52	            FROM prompt_templates pt
53	            JOIN prompt_versions pv ON pv.prompt_template_id = pt.id
54	            WHERE pt.type = $1
55	            ORDER BY pv.version_number DESC
56	            """,
57	            prompt_type,
58	        )
59	        return [
60	            {
61	                "id": str(r["id"]),
62	                "version_number": r["version_number"],
63	                "is_active": r["is_active"],
64	                "created_at": r["created_at"].isoformat(),
65	            }
66	            for r in rows
67	        ]
68	
69	    def _default_prompt(self, prompt_type: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
70	        defaults = {
71	            "RESUME_GENERATION": {
72	                "system_prompt": (
73	                    "[Persona] 한국 취업 시장 자기소개서 코치.\n"
74	                    "[Guard] 제공 경험만 사용. 사실 추가 금지. 부족 시 '내용이 부족하여 생성하지 않음'만 출력.\n"
75	                    "[Task] 공고 분석·STAR·rewrite_level 반영.\n"
76	                    "[Output] 한국어 본문만."
77	                ),
78	                "user_prompt": (
79	                    "Experiences:\n{{experiences}}\n\n"
80	                    "Job:\n{{job_analysis}}\n\n"
81	                    "Style:\n{{writing_style}}\n\n"
82	                    "Rewrite level: {{rewrite_level}}%"
83	                ),
84	            },
85	            "JOB_ANALYSIS": {
86	                "system_prompt": (
87	                    "[Persona] 채용공고 섹션 단위 구조화 분석가 (텍스트/URL/PDF/이미지·OCR). "
88	                    "데이터 일관성·교차 중복 최소화.\n"
89	                    "[Guard] 공고에 없는 정보 발명 금지. 섹션 헤더 기준으로 필드 분리. "
90	                    "주요업무→job_responsibilities, 지원자격/필수→required_skills, "
91	                    "우대/우대요건→preferred_skills, 학력·경력연수·자격증→qualifications. "
92	                    "동일 bullet을 두 필드에 넣지 마세요. tech_keywords는 스택·dr.* 토큰만. "
93	                    "job_description은 요약만.\n"
94	                    "[Output] JSON only: company_name, position, qualifications, required_skills, "
95	                    "preferred_skills, tech_keywords, job_responsibilities, talent_profile, "
96	                    "core_competencies, org_culture, job_description"
97	                ),
98	                "user_prompt": (
99	                    "다음 채용공고를 분석하세요. 섹션 헤더별로 필드를 정확히 나누고, "
100	                    "bullet 중복을 피하세요. 우대 섹션이 있으면 preferred_skills를 채우세요.\n\n"
101	                    "{{content}}"
102	                ),
103	            },

116	                    "[Output] JSON 배열: paragraph_index, strengths, weaknesses, company_fit, "
117	                    "specificity, persuasiveness, star_applied, improvement, suggestion"

120	            },

122	        base = defaults.get(prompt_type, {
123	            "system_prompt": f"Default system prompt for {prompt_type}",
124	            "user_prompt": "{{content}}",
125	        })
126	        return {

131	        }
132	
133	
134	class PromptRenderer:
135	    def render(self, template: str, variables: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
136	        result = template
137	        for key, value in variables.items():
138	            result = result.replace(f"{{{{{key}}}}}", str(value))
139	        return result
140	
141	
142	class PromptTestService:
143	    def __init__(self) -> None:
144	        self._client = OpenAI(api_key=settings.openai_api_key) if settings.openai_api_key else None
145	
146	    def test(self, system_prompt: str, user_prompt: str) -> str:
147	        if not self._client:
148	            return f"[Rule-based test]\nSystem: {system_prompt[:100]}...\nUser: {user_prompt[:200]}..."
149	        response = self._client.chat.completions.create(
150	            model=settings.openai_model,
151	            messages=[
152	                {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt},
153	                {"role": "user", "content": user_prompt},
154	            ],
155	            max_tokens=500,
156	        )
157	        return response.choices[0].message.content or ""
158	
159	
160	prompt_repo = PromptRepository()
161	prompt_renderer = PromptRenderer()
162	prompt_test_service = PromptTestService()
163

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```sql
-- AI_REVIEW 프롬프트에 전체 품질 점수(scores) 산출 요청을 추가한다.
-- 기존에는 문단별 첨삭(reviews)만 요청했고, 자소서 전체 품질 점수는
-- resume-ai에서 하드코딩된 고정값(85/90/80/95)을 반환했다.
-- v4부터는 LLM이 reviews와 함께 scores 객체를 함께 반환하도록 한다.
INSERT INTO prompt_versions (
    id, prompt_template_id, version_number,
    persona_prompt, guard_prompt, task_prompt, output_prompt,
    system_prompt, user_prompt, variables, is_active
)
SELECT
    uuid_generate_v4(),
    t.id,
    4,
    v.persona_prompt,
    v.guard_prompt,
    '문단별로 강점·약점, 채용공고 적합도, 구체성, 설득력, STAR 적용 여부를 평가하고 실행 가능한 개선안을 제시합니다. '
    '또한 자기소개서 전체에 대해 공고 적합도(company_fit), 문체 유지도(style_retention), '
    'STAR 기법 적용도(star_application), 경험 활용도(experience_utilization) 점수를 0~100 사이 정수로 평가합니다.',
    'JSON 객체 하나만 반환하세요. 형식:'                                            || E'\n' ||
    '{'                                                                             || E'\n' ||
    '  "reviews": ['                                                                || E'\n' ||
    '    {'                                                                         || E'\n' ||
    '      "paragraph_index": 0,'                                                   || E'\n' ||
    '      "strengths": string[],'                                                  || E'\n' ||
    '      "weaknesses": string[],'                                                 || E'\n' ||
    '      "company_fit": "높음" | "보통" | "낮음",'                                 || E'\n' ||
    '      "specificity": "높음" | "보통" | "낮음",'                                 || E'\n' ||
    '      "persuasiveness": "높음" | "보통" | "낮음",'                             || E'\n' ||
    '      "star_applied": boolean,'                                                || E'\n' ||
    '      "improvement": "한 줄 개선 제안 (한국어)",'                               || E'\n' ||
    '      "suggestion": "개선된 문단 예시 (선택)"'                                  || E'\n' ||
    '    }'                                                                         || E'\n' ||
    '  ],'                                                                          || E'\n' ||
    '  "scores": {'                                                                 || E'\n' ||
    '    "company_fit": 0~100 정수,'                                                || E'\n' ||
    '    "style_retention": 0~100 정수,'                                            || E'\n' ||
    '    "star_application": 0~100 정수,'                                           || E'\n' ||
    '    "experience_utilization": 0~100 정수'                                      || E'\n' ||
    '  }'                                                                           || E'\n' ||
    '}'                                                                             || E'\n' ||
    'reviews 배열은 근거 없이 비우지 말고, scores는 자기소개서 내용과 채용공고 분석 내용을 실제로 비교해 산정하세요.',
    '[Persona · 페르소나]' || E'\n' || v.persona_prompt || E'\n\n' ||
    '[Guard · 가드레일]' || E'\n' || v.guard_prompt || E'\n\n' ||
    '[Task · 작업]' || E'\n' ||
    '문단별로 강점·약점, 채용공고 적합도, 구체성, 설득력, STAR 적용 여부를 평가하고 실행 가능한 개선안을 제시합니다. '
    '또한 자기소개서 전체에 대해 공고 적합도(company_fit), 문체 유지도(style_retention), '
    'STAR 기법 적용도(star_application), 경험 활용도(experience_utilization) 점수를 0~100 사이 정수로 평가합니다.' || E'\n\n' ||
    '[Output · 출력]' || E'\n' ||
    'JSON 객체 하나만 반환하세요. 형식:' || E'\n' ||
    '{ "reviews": [ { "paragraph_index": 0, "strengths": string[], "weaknesses": string[], '
    '"company_fit": "높음|보통|낮음", "specificity": "높음|보통|낮음", "persuasiveness": "높음|보통|낮음", '
    '"star_applied": boolean, "improvement": "한 줄 개선 제안", "suggestion": "개선된 문단 예시(선택)" } ], '
    '"scores": { "company_fit": 0~100, "style_retention": 0~100, "star_application": 0~100, "experience_utilization": 0~100 } }' || E'\n' ||
    'reviews 배열은 근거 없이 비우지 말고, scores는 자기소개서 내용과 채용공고 분석 내용을 실제로 비교해 산정하세요.',
    v.user_prompt,
    v.variables,
    false
FROM prompt_templates t
JOIN prompt_versions v ON v.id = t.active_version_id
WHERE t.type = 'AI_REVIEW';

UPDATE prompt_templates
SET active_version_id = (
